subcodes.first_line: O Nasru'l-Atibba! True healing consisteth in the remedying of hearts and the treatment of souls, for through this is everlasting health attained [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نصرالاطباء طب حقیقی معالجه قلوب است و مداواء ارواح چه که صحت ابدیه حاصل
subcodes.subjects: @health and healing; material and spiritual healing, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
